case_title: UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS VS. DAVID TAMBARA et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-03-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-30-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
